name: symbol
description: Ticker symbol: AAPL, TSLA, or SPY (cluster key)

name: adjusted_close
description: Dividend and split adjusted closing price

name: daily_return
description: Percentage return vs previous trading day

name: cumulative_return
description: Cumulative return from the first available date

name: sma_20
description: 20-day simple moving average of adjusted close

name: sma_50
description: 50-day simple moving average of adjusted close

name: sma_200
description: 200-day simple moving average of adjusted close

name: rolling_volatility_20d
description: Annualised standard deviation of daily returns over 20 days

name: drawdown
description: Percentage decline from the rolling 52-week high

name: spy_daily_return
description: SPY daily return on the same date (benchmark)

name: excess_return_vs_spy
description: Stock daily_return minus SPY daily_return (alpha proxy)

name: transformed_at
description: UTC timestamp when dbt produced this row
